description_long: This object is a stylized, small-scale airplane with a cartoonish appearance, featuring a rounded blue fuselage and exaggerated features. The wings are broad, flat, and appear to be made from a different material, possibly mimicking wood or a rough surface, and are attached at a high position on the fuselage. The nose of the airplane is rounded and painted with a lighter blue and white pattern, while the cockpit area is slightly raised and integrated into the main body. The tail section is not distinctly separated, blending into the overall form, and there are no visible engines or landing gear. The underside of the airplane is mostly flat and unadorned, with the main visual interest focused on the top and side profiles.
description: A small, stylized blue airplane with broad, rough-textured high wings and a rounded cartoon-like fuselage.
description_view_0: The airplane is seen from an oblique angle, highlighting the blue fuselage, high-mounted broad wings, and the rounded nose.
description_view_1: The airplane is viewed from above, showing the flat, rough-textured wing surface and the blue cockpit area peeking through the center.
description_view_2: A side profile reveals the thickness of the wings and the protruding blue nose, with minimal detail on the tail.
description_view_3: The airplane is seen from below, emphasizing the blue underside of the fuselage and the attachment of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: high-wing configuration with broad, straight wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles
attribute_tail_design: conventional tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer blended into the fuselage
attribute_cockpit_placement: forward-mounted, integrated cockpit with a single-seat, open design and no visible canopy
